ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of flight operation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of flight operation */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of flight operation */,
  "dep_time" INTEGER /* Actual departure time */,
  "sched_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "dep_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_time" INTEGER /* Actual arrival time */,
  "sched_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier code */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "air_time" INTEGER /* Air time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance traveled in miles */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the flight departs */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the hour when the flight departs */,
  "time_hour" TEXT /* Datetime object representing time of departure */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the origin and destination airports */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim area at the destination airport */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew assigned to the flight */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of departure and arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("carrier") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_tail_number FOREIGN KEY ("tail_number") REFERENCES aircrafts ("tail_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter airport code (IATA) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code representing the airline carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline carrier */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the carrier */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the carrier was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the carrier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Next maintenance due date */,
  "seats_configuration" TEXT /* Seat configuration of the aircraft */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated flight */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., departure, arrival) */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the delay */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Party responsible for the delay (e.g., airline, airport, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations staff, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
